review_text: These nails are so gorgeous!!! Really well made and so so pretty. They're exactly what I wanted ❤️
i bought these for the martyr tour back in november. they’re so adorable and good quality. i loved them!!! thank youuu :3
Nails are beautiful but a little thin so I hope they won’t bend but other than that I’m excited to try them out
Cutest mf nails I’ve ever seen. So many compliments.
Amazing quality nails and super duper cute I 100% recommend!! They were even nice enough to write a letter!! ^w^
Very cute! Very high quality! Exactly what I was hoping for. Made a great gift!
i got these for my gf and they look so cute on her ! its obvious how much time and effort went into these. i’m so grateful and the seller was so communicative and sweet.
the sweetest seller ever and the nails are absolutely beautiful, thank u so much i’ll definitely be back <3
genuinely the most beautiful nails i’ve ever had the pleasure of wearing. they’re made so well and hunter was eager to help when i wanted adjustments!!! will 100% be buying again :3

seller is super communicative, sweet, and talented at what she does!! when there was an issue w the nails design she was super gracious in sorting it out. im literally so obsessed w these nails i will never take these off THANK YOUUUUUU💕💕💕
Super cute, and looks so great in person. She worked really well with me for my custom!❤️

I freaking loved these nails!!! The quality was amazing and even after I popped them off they’re all still all intact so I can def reuse. 100% recommend getting some, the seller is so sweet. Perfect for addition to my Domo costume this year :)

super cute nails, i’ve gotten so many compliments. Amazing quality too they look and feel like i got them done at a salon and a week after wearing they’re still super glossy. seller is also super sweet and i love knowing im supporting a real nail tech and not just a reseller or mass manufacturer!
the cutest nails i’ve ever gotten!!! exactly as described and seller had amazing communication <333
